title: View Formula Column Results on Mobile device
excerpt:
Description
Need to be able to see formula column results on mobile device. 
What are you trying to achieve
We rely heavily on formula columns, and need to be able to view these on mobile devices. Please?

posts.author: RossMac (Ross Macgillivray)
